title: DigitalItem
description: A single digitized object in the NYC Municipal Archives online Collections — a scanned photograph, map, film still, or record page. Canonical schema reconciling the 'NYC Municipal Archives Data Collection: Digital Objects' dataset (28et-rv7b, 5 columns). The metadata is open, but the actual image/asset lives in the vendor DAMS (Preservica at nycrecords.access.preservica.com; formerly LUNA Imaging at nycma.lunaimaging.com) and is reachable only through that portal, not Open Data.

objectType.description: Object type ('object_type') — e.g. photograph, moving image, map, document.

resourceIdentifier.description: Identifier of the parent ArchivalCollection resource ('resource_identifier') — join key to archival-collection.json.
